Merge pull request #43 from fedor-elizarov/patch-1

tga Image orientation fix

author: Fedor Elizarov
message:
Orientation fix


### Orientation
more tga images have different coord orietation (start from top left or bottom left), This is annoying because the textures are then turned upside down, then mirrored, for this I added an auto-rotation for correct display

author: Daniel Holden
message:
Merge pull request #39 from fedor-elizarov/master

Little Fix folder_unload() + SSAO artefacts fix + Shadow fix

author: Fedor Elizarov
message:
Fix correct disable shadows

If  turn off the shadows but the lighting is high, then the whole frame is darkened so that it looks wrong, so you have to clear the texture of the shadows forcibly, and also if the lighting is simple, then the shadows do not work, so we do nothing if there are shadows and there is no lighting

author: Fedor Elizarov
message:
Fix SSAO artefacts

 if `graphics.cfg` `lighting=1`  and `ssao=0` i see artefacts from ssao texture
